problem id: 691608b9
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHR(2)

examples:
  10010100 -> 00100101
  01011100 -> 00010111
  10000100 -> 00100001
  00111010 -> 00001110
  01010100 -> 00010101
  11111010 -> 00111110
  10100110 -> 00101001
  00100001 -> 00001000
  10001010 -> 00100010

query: 10100000
predicted answer: 00101000
